guard_result: UFXX9WXE emits 0 single-variable rows and records single_variable_contract_not_found.

change_summary: Preserved semantic_signals through Stage2 compatibility normalization so the non-DOE recovery contract can read primary variables and sweep flags.

guard_result: UFXX9WXE guard still stayed quiet because surviving semantic_signals alone are not enough without the explicit contract.
